Release notes for Pebble Firmware v1.2, detailing new Bluetooth features and power optimizations.

# Purpose
The release notes document the updates and new features in the Pebble Firmware version 1.2, codenamed "Baconator," for the Pebble E-Paper Watch. Key enhancements include the introduction of the PutBytes protocol for data transfer over Bluetooth, the addition of Airplane Mode to disable the Bluetooth radio, support for the eHCILL Bluetooth module, and low-power optimizations for system watchfaces.
